title: Minecraft Trailer Look but with Performance
description: Minecraft looks like the trailer while still giving performance boost.
body:
This modpack combines the slick **"Low Res Trailer Recreation" by lowresbones** and the speed-focused **"Fabulously Optimized" by robotkoer** for a blend of style and performance.

Experience the game with the best resource pack like **"Bare Bones" by RobotPants**, **"Fresh Animations" by FreshLX**, & **"Bare Bones x Fresh Animations" by Specimen** to add animated visuals inside your world.

With **"BSLShaders" by capttatsu** is a mid-shader and configured it to give a good performance or, keep it classic for better performance, your call!

*Note: You could use any shaders you like or not use any at all for better performance.*
